appraisal_events.evidence: « Non… j'avoue que [je] l'ai délaissé pour une soirée assez différente. J'ai dîné chez… Mme Swann. »
appraisal_events.explanation: By stating he skipped an official banquet to dine at Mme Swann’s, Norpois confers social validation on her salon, positioning it as a rival or alternative to prestigious official society.

status_effects.explanation: Her standing rises locally through the ambassador’s choice to attend her dinner over a high-status official banquet.
